title: Tata Steel is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata Steel is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Steel in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Steel:
Tata Steel is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Steel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
